/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -flto -o vse_core.cpython-311-darwin.so CMakeFiles/vse_core.dir/src/bindings.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_video.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_dnn.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_calib3d.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_features2d.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgproc.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_flann.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_core.4.13.0.dylib
